PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Oct-04-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Justin Hedemark appeared in person for James Funkhouser (petitioner).
Azita Rahim appeared via zoom for Bobby Funkhouser and Christie Muhammed (objectors).

There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Petition for Letters of Administration. James C. Funkhouser is appointed as the Administrator of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $1,200,000.00. Estate administration must be completed within one year. Status on close of estate is set for October 15, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Frank Mahoney III is appointed Probate Referee.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Wong. Not reported.
